name: alcove
hints: The bookcase and window are both important. Examine them carefully.
GET BOOK to take the blood-soaked book - it contains important information. The window leads outside.
GO WINDOW to reach the ledge outside. The books trigger a secret passageway. The book you take is essential for magic transport.
GET BOOK (opens secret passage). GO WINDOW to reach the ledge where you SAY YOHO to teleport to the pirate island.

effects: Message: I may need to say a MAGIC word here!

notes: Key transition room. GET BOOK opens a secret passageway to the attic. GO WINDOW leads to the building ledge (room 5). The book is needed for the YOHO magic teleportation. DOWN returns to the flat.
